summary.lock_marker_in_message: The object is locked by the bucket policy. (10069)
summary.classifier_verdict: MISS — current isR2LockError does NOT detect this shape
classifier_reasons: Fast-path checks code === ObjectLockedByBucketPolicy → no code field, miss
Fallback dual condition needs HTTP status (409|412) → no status field, miss
Nested cause walk → no cause property, miss
summary.remediation_required: Extend isR2LockError to add message-pattern-only detection branch (no status/code required). Match canonical phrase: locked by the bucket policy. Also consider adding numeric code 10069 to a separate KNOWN_NUMERIC_CODES set.
summary.write_once_evidence: put_new (op 3) into locked prefix returned outcome=success → new key in locked prefix is allowed. Matches S3 spike result (PUT new key 200) and validates PR 1a write-once R2 key design.

next_pr: PR 0.2c-pre-1c (or 1b.2) — extend isR2LockError to cover Worker binding error shape; gate prod lock enablement until classifier covers binding throws.
